_comment: Canonical Unity version source of truth for all CI. The newest entry of `all` (last element) is the 'latest' tracked by perf-numbers/unity-benchmarks. `release` is the version release.yml and unity-gameci-experiment.yml pin. Bump versions HERE; scripts/validate-unity-versions.js fails if any consumer drifts. See .llm/skills/github-actions/ for the contract.
